title: Department Manager Vacancy at Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions:
Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions!
